news_list.title: State incentives power India's EV market growth
news_list.summary:
As environmental consciousness rises, Indian consumers are increasingly opting for electric vehicles. Favorable state policies are making EV ownership more accessible, leading to a transformation in purchasing patterns. States like Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, and Karnataka are witnessing remarkable spikes in EV sales. The trajectory of the Indian EV sector points towards sustained growth in the years ahead.

Indian consumers largely adopt electric vehicles based on cost and utility. As state policies shape prices, buyer profiles now see sharp divergence across regions. In Bengaluru, a young professional walked into a car dealer's showroom set on buying a hybrid. It felt like the safer choice. But by the time the salesperson broke down the final on-road cost, the equation shifted.

Karnataka's electric mobility policy, through road tax waivers and lower registration charges, had narrowed the upfront price gap more than expected. Add lower running costs, and the decision flipped.

Also Read: EVs ring in new fiscal on strong note

He drove out in an electric Mahindra XEV 9e. That last-mile shift in intent is increasingly defining electric vehicle (EV) transition, and helps explain why states such as Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal and Madhya Pradesh are emerging as key growth centres. In FY2026, India's EV market continued to expand.

Policy Support& GrowingAwareness

The EV market crossed an estimated 2.5-2.7-million-unit sales across segments, according to industry estimates. Yet adoption remains uneven, with a handful of states driving a disproportionate share. Uttar Pradesh leads in absolute terms, with about six lakh EVs sold in FY26, largely dominated by electric three-wheelers. Here, the transition is driven by economics.

For drivers, EVs are less about sustainability and more about improving daily earnings through lower fuel and maintenance costs. Maharashtra, with roughly four lakh EV sales, reflects a more diversified market. Policy support, including purchase incentives, scrappage-linked benefits, and early investments in charging infrastructure, has enabled adoption across personal and commercial segments.

Cities such as Mumbai and Pune are seeing rising traction in electric passenger vehicles alongside strong twowheeler growth. Karnataka, anchored by Bengaluru, has emerged as a key urban market, led by consumers focused on total cost of ownership. Tax waivers, faster registrations and improving charging infrastructure continue to support adoption.

Tamil Nadu, with about 1.5-2 lakh EV sales, benefits from its dual role as a manufacturing hub and a consumption market, allowing supply and demand to scale together. In West Bengal and Madhya Pradesh, where sales are estimated at about 1-1.5 lakh units each, affordability is shaping demand.

Also Read: India's consumption stands its ground amid Gulf War tremors

Incentives targeted at two- and three-wheelers are drawing in first-time buyers and small businesses, positioning EVs as income-generating assets.

What ties these markets together is not just policy ambition, but execution. "Consumers respond when incentives are visible and predictable, which reduces hesitation at the point of purchase," said Sai Giridhar, vice president of the Federation of Automobile Dealers Association. Industry players say the shift is no longer policy-led alone.

"EV adoption in these states is being driven by incentives alongside a clear economic shift away from ICE vehicles," said Kaustubh Dhonde, founder and CEO of AutoNxt Automation.

news_list.title: CEA  Nageswaran calls for capex push amid EV growth momentum
news_list.summary:
India's top companies saw profits soar post-Covid. However, investments lagged. Chief economic adviser V Anantha Nageswaran called for corporate introspection. He highlighted that companies accumulated cash instead of investing in real assets. This forced the public sector to drive growth. Nageswaran stressed the need for private sector investment to seize domestic opportunities and address trade deficits.

Chief economic adviser V Anantha Nageswaran on Saturday exhorted the corporate sector to reflect on its choices, pointing out that while the average profitability of top 500 listed companies shot up nearly 31% annually for five years after the Covid-19 pandemic, investments by them remained disappointing.

Many companies and entrepreneurs choose to accumulate cash profits and probably set up family offices elsewhere, rather than investing in real assets on the ground, he said at a conference in the national capital. "No matter how difficult the operating environment is, which is often given as an excuse (for holding investments back), that didn't come in the way of their profitability after the pandemic," he said.

Also Read: India should create strategic buffers to navigate 'most difficult' energy shock: CEA Nageswaran

Companies in a very few countries may have amassed such profits after the pandemic, while the regulatory environment in India has only improved, the CEA stressed. "In spite of that, if there is a reluctance to invest on the ground, then there is also an important reason for the corporate sector, or the private sector, to reflect on its own priorities," Nageswaran said, urging India Inc to do its bit to spur a broadbased investment resurgence amid external headwinds.

Inadequate investments by the private sector in the aftermath of the pandemic have forced the public sector to do the heavy lifting of boosting growth. He flagged India's $140 billion annual goods trade deficit, after excluding oil, gems and jewellery (where import dependence is natural), and underscored the cost of below-par investment by domestic companies in not creating capacities to take advantage of domestic opportunities.

Diversify Supply Chain

The CEA said the gap between the real effective exchange rates of the rupee and yuan has reduced, which will aid Indian firms' competitiveness vis-à-vis their Chinese counterparts. "Now it should be relatively expensive to import from China and relatively inexpensive to export, everything else being equal. And therefore, that is a good reason to think of diversifying your supply sources away from China."

Also Read: CEA Anantha Nageswaran flags energy risk to growth story

Against this backdrop, he said, Indian industry has an opportunity to leverage the country's free trade pacts with key economies and scale up exports. India needs to set up strategic buffers of key commodities, given the energy shock it's facing due to the West Asia conflict, Nageswaran emphasised. The war-induced surge in global oil and fertiliser prices will make it challenging for the Centre to realise its fiscal deficit target for FY27, he said, adding that belownormal monsoon rainfall and pass-through of higher energy prices could lead to a potential inflation surge.

news_list.title: Top B-schools see pay surge as hiring picks up
news_list.summary:
New Delhi | Bengaluru: Private business schools in India, such as XLRI, Tata Institute of Social Sciences, SPJIMR, MDI Gurgaon and IMT Ghaziabad, are seeing better compensation packages being offered to the class of 2026 compared to the previous batch.

With the consulting and financial sectors doing well, along with legacy recruiters and new recruiters lining up, average and median packages have gone up at most of these institutions, according to placement officials.

Also Read: Non-engineering undergrads bag top placement offers in a tough year

The technology sector and startups have scaled down hiring this year, they said, and the number of offers per recruiter has marginally decreased on average in the ongoing placements, even as the total number of recruiters has seen an increase in most cases, said institutes. Bulk hiring has been replaced with domain-focused hiring, according to the officials.

"The 2026 placement season shows measured resilience with selective improvement, especially considering continued global macroeconomic uncertainty," said Ayyalusamy Kanagaraj, convenor, corporate relations and placement, XLRI Jamshedpur.

The average cost to company at XLRI has increased slightly to about 31-32 lakh per annum for the batch of 2026, as against 29.9 lakh per annum in the previous year, while the top offer is 75 lakh per annum against '67- 70 lakh per annum. "2025 saw a dip due to macro slowdown while 2026 indicates a recovery phase, though not a full return to 2024 highs yet," said Kanagaraj.

Internship-to-hire path

The consulting sector remains dominant, while the banking, financial services and insurance sector, including fintech, has seen a rebound this year at most B-schools. "The placement season for the class of 2026 at SPJIMR reflects a resilient and slightly stronger outcome," said Bhishm Chugani, director, Career Services, SPJIMR.

The average and median packages at SPJIMR have increased to 33.6 lakh per annum and 32.85 lakh per annum, compared to 32 lakh and 31.5 lakh, respectively, last year. But the top offer dropped to 75 lakh per annum from 89 lakh in 2025. The 2026 placement season has been better than last year, with stronger recruiter participation and high compensation levels, according to Kirti Sharma, chairperson, GP Placements and chairperson, MDI.

The average package at MDI for the PGDM programme has increased to 29.45 lakh per annum from 27.39 lakh last year. The top offer has shot up to 97.5 lakh per annum from 53.6 lakh last year, said Sharma.

Also Read: Global degrees on Indian soil sound like a great deal, until you read the fine print

For the Tata Institute of Social Sciences, mean salary package has gone up, compared to the yearago figure, to 28.69 lakh, while the top offer has surged to 66 lakh per annum against 36.25 lakh per annum. IMT Ghaziabad has seen a notable increase in average compensation across programmes and specialisations, according to Warren Stanley Patrick, faculty chairperson, Placements & Career Readiness.

The highest package at IMT till now is 46.17 lakh per annum, and the average package is 17.89 lakh per annum, while the median package is 17 lakh per annum. Last year, the highest package was 41.55 lakh per annum, average package was 16.07 lakh per annum and the median package was 15 lakh per annum.

The highest number of offers at SPJIMR came from companies including Accenture, PwC US and American Express. Other recruiters that have extended offers at the institute this year include Axis AMC, Bank of America, Citi and Continental. "Recruiters are increasingly prioritising internship-to-hire pipelines, with pre-placement offers emerging as the dominant route for talent acquisition," said Chugani.

news_list.title: Singapore, Malaysia expand cross-border taxi fleet, broaden drop-off access - VnExpress International
news_list.summary:
For years, cross-border taxis traveling between the two neighbors could only pick up and drop off passengers at a single designated point in the destination country.

Under the updated regulations, Malaysian taxis are now permitted to drop off passengers at any location within Singapore. Conversely, Singaporean taxis can transport passengers to key hubs in Johor, including Johor Bahru, Iskandar Puteri, Forest City, Kulai, and Senai.

The total number of licensed cross-border taxis will increase from 200 to 300 for each country, according to a joint statement released by the two transport ministries.

"From May 4, the cross-border taxi services between Singapore and Malaysia will be enhanced to bring greater convenience to travelers while ensuring fair operating conditions for transport providers and drivers in both countries," the statement read.

A traveler in Singapore can now book a local taxi to travel directly from their home to locations such as Johor Bahru City Square.

However, Malaysian taxis are still prohibited from picking up passengers from residential addresses in Singapore and must continue to use designated pick-up points.

To maintain order and combat illegal transport operations, all participating vehicles must adhere to strict identification standards. This includes displaying specific liveries, unique license plate prefixes, and official taxi topper signage. Taxis must also be fitted with tracking or enforcement devices to ensure compliance with the host country's regulatory framework.

Grab, currently the main ride-hailing platform offering cross-border taxi bookings between Singapore and Johor, announced Thursday that it will pilot a new service on its app, the Cross-Border SG-JB (Beta) service, on May 4.

Under the new license, Grab can provide advance, door-to-door bookings between locations in Singapore and approved areas in Johor.
news_list.source: VnExpress International – Latest news, business, travel and analysis from Vietnam

themes.name: 聯準會維持利率不變，美元維持強勢
themes.insight: 聯準會(Fed)決定維持利率於較高水準以應對通膨，此舉為美元提供了強力支撐，並對全球資金流向，特別是新興市場債券，構成持續性影響。
evidence: FED維持利率不變，支撐美元...
FOMC利率決議前，美元保持強勢
富蘭克林：利率維持較高水準 ...
1.摩根士丹利新興債團隊：新興債...

themes.name: 印度邦政府政策刺激電動車市場蓬勃發展
themes.insight: 印度各邦政府透過稅收減免、降低註冊費及提供購買誘因等地方性政策，有效降低了電動車的總體擁有成本，成功刺激了消費者的購買意願，使電動車在馬哈拉施特拉邦、北方邦和卡納塔克邦等地的銷量顯著增長。
evidence: State incentives power India's EV market growth

themes.name: 印度政府呼籲企業增加資本支出以推動經濟
themes.insight: 印度首席經濟顧問指出，儘管企業在疫情後利潤飆升，但普遍選擇累積現金而非進行實質資產投資，迫使公共部門承擔更多增長責任。政府因此敦促私營部門增加資本支出，以把握國內機遇並應對貿易逆差。
evidence: CEA  Nageswaran calls for capex push amid EV growth momentum

themes.name: 印度高階就業市場回溫，頂尖商學院畢業生薪資上漲
themes.insight: 在顧問和金融業的強勁招聘帶動下，印度頂尖商學院2026年畢業生的平均薪酬顯著高於前一屆。此現象反映了即使在科技業招聘放緩的背景下，印度高階人才的就業市場已出現選擇性復甦的跡象。
evidence: Top B-schools see pay surge as hiring picks up

themes.name: 新加坡與馬來西亞深化跨境交通合作
themes.insight: 為提升旅客便利性，新加坡與馬來西亞宣布增加跨境計程車牌照數量，並放寬乘客下車地點的限制。此舉預期將促進兩國間的人員流動，並為Grab等叫車平台帶來新的商機。
sources: VnExpress International – Latest news, business, travel and analysis from Vietnam
evidence: Singapore, Malaysia expand cross-border taxi fleet, broaden drop-off access - VnExpress International

tech_topic_heatmap.summary: 科技主題熱度集中在 聯準會維持利率不變，美元維持強勢、印度邦政府政策刺激電動車市場蓬勃發展、印度政府呼籲企業增加資本支出以推動經濟，主線仍由新聞主題驅動。

topics.topic: 聯準會維持利率不變，美元維持強勢
topics.summary: 聯準會(Fed)決定維持利率於較高水準以應對通膨，此舉為美元提供了強力支撐，並對全球資金流向，特別是新興市場債券，構成持續性影響。
evidence: FED維持利率不變，支撐美元...
FOMC利率決議前，美元保持強勢
富蘭克林：利率維持較高水準 ...
1.摩根士丹利新興債團隊：新興債...

topics.topic: 印度邦政府政策刺激電動車市場蓬勃發展
topics.summary: 印度各邦政府透過稅收減免、降低註冊費及提供購買誘因等地方性政策，有效降低了電動車的總體擁有成本，成功刺激了消費者的購買意願，使電動車在馬哈拉施特拉邦、北方邦和卡納塔克邦等地的銷量顯著增長。
evidence: State incentives power India's EV market growth

topics.topic: 印度政府呼籲企業增加資本支出以推動經濟
topics.summary: 印度首席經濟顧問指出，儘管企業在疫情後利潤飆升，但普遍選擇累積現金而非進行實質資產投資，迫使公共部門承擔更多增長責任。政府因此敦促私營部門增加資本支出，以把握國內機遇並應對貿易逆差。
evidence: CEA  Nageswaran calls for capex push amid EV growth momentum

topics.topic: 印度高階就業市場回溫，頂尖商學院畢業生薪資上漲
topics.summary: 在顧問和金融業的強勁招聘帶動下，印度頂尖商學院2026年畢業生的平均薪酬顯著高於前一屆。此現象反映了即使在科技業招聘放緩的背景下，印度高階人才的就業市場已出現選擇性復甦的跡象。
evidence: Top B-schools see pay surge as hiring picks up

topics.topic: 新加坡與馬來西亞深化跨境交通合作
topics.summary: 為提升旅客便利性，新加坡與馬來西亞宣布增加跨境計程車牌照數量，並放寬乘客下車地點的限制。此舉預期將促進兩國間的人員流動，並為Grab等叫車平台帶來新的商機。
sources: VnExpress International – Latest news, business, travel and analysis from Vietnam
evidence: Singapore, Malaysia expand cross-border taxi fleet, broaden drop-off access - VnExpress International

ai_analysis.full_text:
【今日結論】
週一 (05/04) 開盤前，市場面臨多空兩大力量的劇烈拉扯。一方面，台積電 ADR 飆升帶來超過 18% 的溢價，預示著科技股有強勁的開盤動能；另一方面，油價站上 108 美元的關鍵警報線，引發通膨與需求破壞的宏觀憂慮，並已反映在小幅拉回的台指期夜盤上。這場「科技股樂觀預期」與「宏觀經濟風險」的對決，將主導週一盤勢走向。
【新聞驅動】
市場敘事由兩大主線構成：首先，AI 應用加速落地的預期持續發酵，即使輝達股價短期回檔，市場仍熱議其長期潛力，為科技股提供基本面支撐。然而，更迫切的變數來自原物料，布蘭特原油衝上 108 美元，這不僅是通膨信號，更是歷史上的「需求破壞」與「大空頭」觸發點，恐將衝擊企業成本與終端消費，迫使全球央行轉向。
【國際與台股】
上週四美股由科技股領軍收紅，帶動台積電 ADR 相對於台灣現貨的溢價擴大至驚人的 18.13%，這通常預示著週一開盤後有強烈的補漲追價力道。然而，這種極端樂觀情緒並未完全同步到期貨市場，台指期夜盤小跌 0.31%，富台指則呈現持平，顯示部分資金對於追高與宏觀風險仍抱持戒心，兩者間的巨大分歧是開盤前最大的不確定性。
【KOL與情緒】
市場情緒處於「貪婪」區間 (CNN 恐懼貪婪指數 66)，主流意見領袖 (KOL) 仍肯定 AI 是長期驅動力，但警示音量正在放大，點出量價背離、外資籌碼鬆動等潛在風險。社群熱搜關鍵字從產業的「晶圓代工」到宏觀的「油價」、「經濟衰退」，反映出投資人雖身處牛市，卻也對系統性風險保持高度警惕。
【操作含意】
週一操作的核心在於應對「開高」後的走勢。在 ADR 巨大溢價的推動下，台股開盤跳空上漲的機率極高，但須慎防「利多出盡」或「懼高」的獲利了結賣壓。盤中關鍵訊號在於：開盤後的跳空缺口能否守住，以及台積電現貨價格能否有效收斂與 ADR 之間的溢價。若開高後買盤無力為繼，則表明市場對油價等宏觀風險的擔憂，正壓過單一科技股的樂觀情緒。

selected_charts.title: 美股與風險資產
selected_charts.description: S&P 500、Nasdaq、SOX、VIX 與美元、黃金、原油的跨資產訊號。
selected_charts.takeaway: 週末收盤，美股呈現分歧，科技股（Nasdaq +0.89%, SOX +0.87%）表現強勁，延續 AI 驅動的樂觀情緒。然而，道瓊指數收黑 (-0.31%)，且原油價格站回 108 美元，顯示市場對宏觀經濟風險的擔憂並未消散，呈現科技樂觀與總經謹慎並存的格局。
selected_charts.action: 觀察下週科技股動能是否能克服總經風險的壓力。

selected_charts.title: 科技主題熱度圖
selected_charts.description: 科技新聞主題與市場主線的熱度排名與來源證據。
selected_charts.takeaway: 從新聞主線熱度觀察，本週市場的宏觀焦點清晰：聯準會維持高利率的決策持續支撐強勢美元，而印度市場的電動車政策與資本支出成為新的增長敘事。這表明，除了科技題材，資金流向與新興市場動態也是影響盤面的關鍵變數。
selected_charts.action: 關注強勢美元對新興市場的影響，並追蹤印度經濟政策的後續發展。

selected_charts.title: 社群熱度圖
selected_charts.description: PTT / Dcard / Google Trends 的熱門主題、速度與升溫強度。
selected_charts.takeaway: 社群熱度高度集中在科技領域，包含「SpaceX」、「先進封裝」與「晶圓代工」等主題皆出現顯著升溫。此現象反映散戶投資人對核心科技趨勢的關注度不減，為相關族群提供話題動能與情緒支撐。
selected_charts.action: 留意社群熱議主題是否能轉化為下週盤面的實際交易動能。

selected_charts.title: 美股分析師共識圖
selected_charts.description: Seeking Alpha 的 Quant、作者與華爾街評級共識，搭配多頭/空頭強弱排序。
selected_charts.takeaway: Seeking Alpha 分析師共識顯示，大型科技股（Magnificent 7）內部評價出現分歧。儘管如 GOOGL、AMZN、META 等公司獲得較高的一致看好評級，但 TSLA 的評價相對保守。這提醒投資者在追逐科技主線時，仍需關注個別公司的基本面與分析師評價差異。
selected_charts.action: 將分析師共識納入大型科技股的佈局參考，避免盲目追高所有科技巨頭。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 週末收盤，美股呈現分歧，科技股（Nasdaq +0.89%, SOX +0.87%）表現強勁，延續 AI 驅動的樂觀情緒。然而，道瓊指數收黑 (-0.31%)，且原油價格站回 108 美元，顯示市場對宏觀經濟風險的擔憂並未消散，呈現科技樂觀與總經謹慎並存的格局。
chart_commentary.action: 觀察下週科技股動能是否能克服總經風險的壓力。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 從新聞主線熱度觀察，本週市場的宏觀焦點清晰：聯準會維持高利率的決策持續支撐強勢美元，而印度市場的電動車政策與資本支出成為新的增長敘事。這表明，除了科技題材，資金流向與新興市場動態也是影響盤面的關鍵變數。
chart_commentary.action: 關注強勢美元對新興市場的影響，並追蹤印度經濟政策的後續發展。

chart_commentary.takeaway: 社群熱度高度集中在科技領域，包含「SpaceX」、「先進封裝」與「晶圓代工」等主題皆出現顯著升溫。此現象反映散戶投資人對核心科技趨勢的關注度不減，為相關族群提供話題動能與情緒支撐。
chart_commentary.action: 留意社群熱議主題是否能轉化為下週盤面的實際交易動能。

chart_commentary.takeaway: Seeking Alpha 分析師共識顯示，大型科技股（Magnificent 7）內部評價出現分歧。儘管如 GOOGL、AMZN、META 等公司獲得較高的一致看好評級，但 TSLA 的評價相對保守。這提醒投資者在追逐科技主線時，仍需關注個別公司的基本面與分析師評價差異。
chart_commentary.action: 將分析師共識納入大型科技股的佈局參考，避免盲目追高所有科技巨頭。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 本週末市場觀察，呈現一場「科技樂觀」與「宏觀風險」的對峙。美股科技股在 AI 敘事下強勢收高，社群對相關主題的熱度不減，然而，油價重回 108 美元關鍵水位，加上聯準會維持高利率的政策，為市場前景蒙上通膨與緊縮的陰影。市場主線熱度亦顯示，除了科技題材外，投資人正密切關注總經政策與新興市場的發展，預示下週盤勢將在這兩股力量的拉扯中展開。

news_themes.label: 印度經濟與市場動態
news_themes.summary: 印度市場展現多重動能，各邦政府的地方性政策成功刺激電動車銷量；同時，政府敦促私營部門增加資本支出，以推動整體經濟增長。此外，高階就業市場回溫，顯示印度經濟在高附加價值領域出現復甦跡象。
evidence: State incentives power India's EV market growth
CEA Nageswaran calls for capex push amid EV growth momentum
Top B-schools see pay surge as hiring picks up

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: AI 總結與市場評論經常提及台積電 ADR 溢價是觀察台股開盤動能的關鍵先行指標，但目前缺乏專門圖表來視覺化其歷史水平與近期趨勢。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: AI 總結提及：『台積電 ADR 飆升帶來超過 18% 的溢價』。
